title: deploy: fix success output — backend returns 'url' not 'page_url'
description: The hosted deploy success handler reads data.page_url but the backend returns { url: '...' }. Fix the field name and keep output as a one-liner.

features: In deployHosted() in src/commands/deploy.js, change: const pageUrl = data.page_url || '(unknown)'; to: const pageUrl = data.url || data.page_url || '(unknown)';
Keep the success output as a single line: '✓ Deployed to <url>'

notes: Keep data.page_url as fallback for forward-compatibility in case the field name changes again.
